introSection:
Infernal Toboggan is a travelling steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SDC currently owned by French showman Lapère.

It appears at the annual Foire du Trône in France.
fullText:
Infernal Toboggan is a travelling steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SDC currently owned by French showman Lapère.

It appears at the annual Foire du Trône in France.
